title: Someone who watched but never participated
content:
Someone who watched but never participated

Go
Blow Away
Let gusts carry me
I will leave
You be left




Force apart the waves
The waves holding this window closed
Breathe
I’ll breathe even where I can’t by will or might
For even when I’m here or there
Anywhere
I’ll make my way



————————————————————————————

Triptico

Dark club
Black eyes
Back room
Slacked ties
Come down now
Come with me

To meet us
To feed us
Same place
I believed
Different space
You can see
Swap looks
Then
Swap lives
No words
Share ice
Goodbye
Good life
Goodbye


Been here before
Harmless
I swear
